---
title: "WRDS - Wharton Research Data Service"
page-layout: article
---

# WRDS - Wharton Research Data Service

**Provider:** WRDS

## Description

Research platform providing access to financial, accounting, banking, economic, and market datasets. Supports empirical research using licensed business and finance data.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/pages/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
